title: Mo-Combat
description: Adds new combat items to the game, including a new weapon type craftable with each material, and new shields for each material!
body:
# Adds many new Combat items!
## Including a brand new type of weapon: Scythes!
- Scythes are meant to bridge the gap between swords and axes whilst having their own unique properties, such as maxed out sweeping damage and extended reach
## New Shields!
- New shields for each material; Wood, Stone, Iron (basic shield), diamond, and netherite, with new unique shields to come!
## A special Epic weapon! 
- Collect a breeze rod to unlock the Windbound Katana recipe!

OLD Thumbnail credit: Krita Stabiliser

### For support, join the Discord: [https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf](https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf)
